Marital Status: Married; Relation to Head of House: Head
Marital Status: Widowed; Relation to Head of House: Mother-in-law

notes: Great-grandmother. Born in Indiana. Parents: Thomas A. Mayes (1837-1906) and Rachel Sara DuBois (1839-1890). Mother died when Mary Esther was 17. Siblings: Catherine M. Mayes (1871-1934), Thomas A. Mayes Jr. (1875-1933), Morse O. Mayes (1876-), Samuel H. Mayes (1878-), Liggan A. Mayes (1880-1933). Married William Wallace Gordon on January 23, 1895 in DC. One daughter: Myrtelle M. Gordon (1896). Father Thomas died June 28, 1906. Husband William died June 23, 1926. Listed as Head of household in 1930 census, then as 'Mother-in-law' in 1940 (living with Andrew and Myrtelle Gemeny). Brothers Liggan and Thomas both died April 28, 1933. Sister Catherine died 1934. Died April 25, 1957 at age 84. Buried in Washington, DC.
